name: todolist
description: A kanban-style todo manager for Obsidian with priority and tags support

scripts.build: node esbuild.config.mjs production && node -e "var p='E:/知识库/.obsidian/plugins/todolist';var f=require('fs');['main.js','manifest.json','styles.css'].forEach(function(n){f.copyFileSync(n,p+'/'+n);console.log('  copied: '+n)});console.log('>> 已部署到: '+p)"

author: lilingtao
